title: GAP MINISTRIES - 211info
text: LOVE INC OF GREATER HILLSBORO GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential household items, including beds and bedding, linens, furniture, clothing, diapers, hygiene products, cleaning and laundry supplies, paper goods, and work boots. Donations are accepted of the items the agency distributes, with an ongoing need for couches, kitchen tables, and queen-size or smaller beds (including mattresses, box springs, and frames). Referrals to local food pantries are available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday noon-2:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9:30am-noon Email (503) 917-0205 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 917-0205 Main phone (503) 648-0700 Alternate Main phone (503) 917-0205 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hillsboro School District (Cities of Hillsboro and North Plains) Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Cleaning Products Clothing Donation Programs Diapers Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Kitchenware Kitchenware Donation Programs Laundry Products Mattress Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESTORING HOPE CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
